MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining The Current Trial Date With Preference
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs
/ moving parties Diana Davis as successor-in-interest to and as wrongful death heir of Richard Davis, deceased, et al.
Ian P. Dillion of WFBM, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant / opposing party J-M Manufacturing Company, Inc.
Adam P. Pearse of WFBM, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant / joinder FDCC California, Inc.
Constance Fraenkel of SPANOS | PRZETAK (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER MAINTAINING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion for order maintaining the current trial date with preference is denied without prejudice. Plaintiffs failed to demonstrate that the health of Diana Davis is such that preference is necessary to prevent prejudicing her interest in the litigation, as required by C.C.P. 36(a). Counsel for J-M Manufacturing Company, Inc. is to prepare and submit an order in compliance with C.R.C. 3.1312. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Reporter: David A. Disbrow, CSR #7768 (Tel: 415-298-1538) (503/CML)
